intake.user_request: Implement --max-tokens truncation in the rag-search CLI. Currently --top-k 50 produces unbounded output (~30KB). Add a --max-tokens flag that truncates result text to the specified token budget before printing.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single file edit (src/cli/rag-search.ts): add one CLI flag, one truncation helper, wire into output path. No architectural changes, no new files required.

hotspot_files.reason: 194 LOC main function; WO-LEVERAGE-AUDIT-FRESH-PASS-001 Ph7 MEDIUM finding

in_scope: Add maxTokens field to CliArgs interface
Wire truncation into non-JSON output path before printing
Wire truncation into JSON output path (truncate result text fields)
out_of_scope: Changes to SemanticSearchService or vector store
New test files (dispatch does not require new tests)
Changes to rag-index.ts or any other CLI

constraints: No production code changes outside src/cli/rag-search.ts
rag-search without --max-tokens must behave identically to current
Baseline test count 1496/1526 must be maintained
